remarks: Welcome to Vermont in Wilton! 1.5+ acres + I/G SW Pool! 3 Bedroom New England Cape sanctuary tucked away in a peaceful pocket of North Wilton. One meticulous owner since built in 1973, this rare find offers a charmingly rustic, soul-warming lifestyle combined with the refined convenience of Wilton living. A true testament to quality craftsmanship and generations of pride of ownership. Now, freshly painted and prepared for the next chapter. Warm hardwood floors on Main level and 4 panel sliders invite the outside in and create a panoramic view of the natural surroundings and parade of wildlife. Primary first floor Bedroom continues with hardwood, walk in closet and en suite Full bathroom. With 2 Bedrooms upstairs and 2nd Full Bath, there is no shortage of closet space with hidden closet storage! The exceptional grounds offer an incredible level of privacy on your own secret park. The in ground heated salt water pool is perfect to beat the summer heat or for outdoor poolside gatherings, framed by nature's bounty.Properties with this level of soul, history and privacy are a rare find in Wilton. If you've been dreaming of a serene escape without sacrificing proximity to town, this cherished single owned property is ready to welcome you home. Award winning schools, seconds to Rt. 7, shopping, trains, restaurants and the up and coming Georgetown revivial with fun night life, this home offers a singular, affordable lifestyle. Awaiting your updates! Property is an Estate, sold AS IS
